results.title: Feng Shui lucky colors to attract good fortune at home
results.description: Feng Shui principles highlight colors' vibrational impact on home energy. Light blue promotes peace and balance, while yellow signifies joy and prosperity. White offers clarity and contentment, ideal for drawing rooms. Pink enhances love and romance, perfect for bedrooms and southwest areas. Discover how these hues can attract positivity and improve your living space.

results.title: Odisha Government Greenlights ₹3,793 Crore Investment Plans to Boost Employment
results.description: The Odisha government has approved investment proposals amounting to ₹3,793 crore, which are projected to create over 19,000 jobs. This decision was made during a meeting of the State Level Single Window Clearance Authority, where 24 proposals across various sectors were greenlit. Key projects include a lab-grown diamond facility and battery energy storage systems, set to be implemented in 14 districts. This initiative marks a significant step towards boosting the state's economy and employment opportunities.

results.title: Abhishek Banerjee travels to Delhi amid buzz over possible revolt in TMC parliamentary ranks
results.description: TMC national general secretary Abhishek Banerjee's early Delhi visit fuels speculation of a potential split in the party's parliamentary ranks, mirroring the recent rebellion in the West Bengal Assembly. The move comes ahead of Mamata Banerjee's arrival for the INDIA bloc meeting, amid reports of efforts to engineer a similar rupture in Parliament.

results.title: Baran Police Seize Smack Worth Rs 1.46 Crore, Three Arrested
results.description: Jaipur, June 6 (Udaipur Kiran): Baran Police, under the special anti-narcotics campaign being conducted across the Kota Range, have seized 732 grams of smack valued at approximately Rs 1.46 crore in the international market and arrested three alleged drug traffickers, including a father-son duo.
